name: Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/2 batch pie pastry, enough for a 9-inch pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out pastry and line a 9-inch pie pan with it.
2. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
3. Cool shell.
4. Combine pumpkin, sugar, and spices in a bowl.
5. Beat eggs and cream into the mixture.
6. If desired, stir in rum.
7. Place the filling into the cooled pastry shell.
8. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour or until a knife inserted into the pie comes clean.
